question_text: What is the amplitude of a wave?

options.label: A
options.text: The maximum distance a particle moves from its rest position

options.label: B
options.text: The distance between two consecutive peaks

options.label: C
options.text: The number of waves passing a point per second

options.label: D
options.text: The speed at which a wave travels

explanation: Amplitude is how far a particle moves up or down from its starting position when a wave passes through it. It measures the 'height' of the wave.
